name: Roy's Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Chile, ground, red, new mexi
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet and saute onions and garlic until soft but not brown. Add minced chiles and saute another couple of minutes.
2. Add tomatoes, bay leaves, thyme, and chili powder to the skillet. Simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Pass half to two-thirds of the mixture through a food mill back into the same skillet. Discard solids. Increase heat and reduce to desired consistency. Add vinegar and black pepper. Taste for salt and adjust seasonings as needed.
4. Refrigerate until ready to use.
